description_long: This nightstand features a modern, boxy design with a two-tone finish: a dark, almost black base and legs, and a lighter, natural wood top and shelf. The structure is open on two opposing sides, with the other two sides enclosed by flat panels, giving it a geometric and minimalist appearance. The top surface is bordered by a thick wooden frame, creating a recessed area in the center. The lower shelf is set within the frame, providing additional storage or display space. The legs are straight and slightly inset, contributing to a sturdy and stable look. There are no visible drawers, handles, or decorative elements, emphasizing its functional and contemporary style.
description: A modern, two-tone nightstand with an open-frame design, flat panels on two sides, and a recessed top bordered by a thick wooden frame. It features a lower shelf and straight, sturdy legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open frame with a visible lower shelf and the thick wooden border around the recessed top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid, flat panel with no openings or handles, highlighting the dark wood finish.
description_view_2: Rear view with another open frame, mirroring the front, and a clear view of the lower shelf and top border.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a solid, flat panel similar to view 1, emphasizing the nightstand's symmetry.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
